_comment: School staff: edit this file to update news and the homepage ticker. Each item needs a date (YYYY-MM-DD), category (Achievement | Event | Notice | Academics), title, and summary. Newest dates are shown first automatically.
announcements: Admissions open for Academic Year 2026–27 — apply before 15 August 2026
PTM for Classes VI–X on Saturday, 25 July 2026, 9:00 AM – 12:30 PM
School reopens after summer break on Monday, 20 July 2026
Inter-House Debate finals will be streamed live in the Virtual Classroom

items.title: Aarav Mehta (XII-A) secures All-India Rank 14 in the National Science Olympiad
items.summary: Our senior science stream continues its Olympiad streak — twelve students cleared the second round, with Aarav reaching the national top twenty.

items.title: Revised school timings for the monsoon term
items.summary: From 20 July, the school day runs 7:50 AM to 1:40 PM for the primary wing and 7:50 AM to 2:30 PM for classes VI–XII. Bus routes leave 15 minutes earlier.

items.title: Annual Production 2026: 'The Palace of Illusions' — auditions announced
items.summary: The theatre department invites students of classes VIII–XII to audition on 28–29 July in the Amphitheatre. Backstage, lighting, and set-design crews also welcome.

items.title: New AI & Data Science elective introduced for Classes XI–XII
items.summary: In partnership with IIT-Delhi's outreach programme, senior students can now opt for a two-year applied AI elective with a project-based curriculum.

items.title: U-17 girls' basketball team wins the Zonal Championship
items.summary: An undefeated run through the zonals takes our team to the state finals in Bhopal this September. Congratulations, Nalanda Lionesses!

items.title: Van Mahotsav week: 1,200 saplings planted by the Eco Club
items.summary: Students, parents, and staff joined hands across all three campuses. Each sapling is tagged and tracked by the middle-school biodiversity project.
